description: Finding asserts fire door assemblies require installation per NFPA 80 and annual inspection; verifier confirmed against NFPA and code-publisher sources.

finding.issue: Section requires field-modified fire door assemblies without the NFPA 80 installation and acceptance-testing requirements the code makes mandatory for rated openings.
finding.replacementText: C. Install and field-modify fire door assemblies per NFPA 80, and perform the acceptance testing NFPA 80 requires before closing in rated openings.

paragraph_map_slice.text: A. Field-modify frames as required to suit conditions.

captured_verifier_response.explanation: The IBC references NFPA 80 for the installation and maintenance of fire door assemblies, and NFPA 80 restricts field modifications of listed assemblies and requires acceptance testing. A rated-opening section permitting unrestricted field modification without NFPA 80 requirements is a genuine gap.

ground_truth.notes: NFPA 80 installation/acceptance requirements for rated openings are code-referenced and well documented; CONFIRMED with grounded citations is correct.
